description: FINAL build of the session (superset, WARRANT#22-32): fixes the two gaps found in the integrity sweep -- Living-Edge state now persists across ARMED-save instant-restarts (new guarded tail 0xE511), and radioactive (TRANSITIONING-phase) cells now get an independent conviction trim alongside the significant-inversion trim. Compiled clean, 0 errors, 1 pre-existing unrelated warning. This supersedes the SLS(46).ex4 sent earlier. Not yet run.
